input_text: For 4100i AOS-CX 10.18, what does the snmp-server vrf command do?
target_value: The snmp-server vrf command configures a VRF on which the SNMP agent listens for incoming requests. By default, the SNMP agent does not listen on any VRF. 4100i, 6000, and 6100 only support default VRF. The SNMP agent can listen on multiple VRFs. The no form of this command stops the SNMP agent from listening for incoming requests on the specified VRF. Specifies the name of a VRF. <VRF-NAME>.
